# Proxy Support India

> Proxy Support India provides end-to-end IT career proxy support: proxy interview support, proxy job support, profile engineering, profile marketing, profile managing, recruiter-call generation, and complete job support across USA, Canada, UK, Europe, Australia, Singapore, Japan, New Zealand, Gulf and India. USA-first, global, India-to-global. The word "proxy" here means hands-on, round-wise, real-time support — not impersonation.

## Core services
- [Proxy Interview Support](https://proxysupportindia.com/proxy-interview-support): JD-based, round-wise help to clear technical interviews.
- [Proxy Job Support](https://proxysupportindia.com/proxy-job-support): real-time help with day-to-day project work.
- [Profile Engineering](https://proxysupportindia.com/profile-engineering): ATS + JD-aligned CV and LinkedIn positioning.
- [Profile Marketing](https://proxysupportindia.com/profile-marketing): recruiter/vendor outreach and applications.
- [Profile Managing](https://proxysupportindia.com/profile-managing): full job-search execution management.
- [Get More Recruiter Calls](https://proxysupportindia.com/get-more-recruiter-calls): profile-to-call conversion.
- [End-to-End IT Career Proxy Support](https://proxysupportindia.com/end-to-end-it-career-proxy-support): profile to interview to stable job.

## Markets
USA (center), Canada, UK, Europe, Australia, Singapore, Japan, New Zealand, UAE, Saudi Arabia, Germany, Ireland, Netherlands, France, Sweden, Switzerland, Hong Kong, India.

## Priority technologies
AI/ML, GenAI, LLM, RAG, Agentic AI, MLOps, Data Engineering, Snowflake, Databricks, DevOps, AWS, Azure, Kubernetes, Terraform, SRE, Cloud Security, Java, Spring Boot, Python, .NET, Node.js, React, Angular, Workday, UiPath/RPA, Salesforce, SAP, QA Automation, SQL.
